services.name: Airtable
services.purpose: Primary data store for athletes, coaches, admin users, portal content
recoverySteps: Verify PAT has read/write on base appvVr6MVrJvEY0YJ
services.backupStrategy: Airtable snapshot export weekly; field IDs documented in app/api/apply/route.ts

services.name: Stripe
services.purpose: Fee payment checkout and webhook processing
recoverySteps: Create Stripe account keys in Vercel Production
services.backupStrategy: Stripe Dashboard transaction export; metadata includes recordId

services.name: Resend
services.purpose: Transactional email — apply confirmations, enrollments, admin alerts
recoverySteps: Confirm RESEND_API_KEY and RESEND_FROM_EMAIL in Vercel
services.backupStrategy: Resend delivery logs; duplicate alerts via Make optional

services.name: Make.com
services.purpose: Automation webhooks for apply and enrollment workflows
recoverySteps: Verify scenario URLs in Make.com dashboard
Update Vercel env vars to match active scenario webhooks
services.backupStrategy: Make scenario export; in-app Resend as fallback for apply emails

services.name: Google Forms
services.purpose: External player application and fee agreement forms (current production UX path)
recoverySteps: Confirm form ownership under CPR Google account
Document field mapping if migrating to on-platform apply
services.healthVerification: GET /apply returns 307 to expected Google Form URL
services.backupStrategy: Form export in Google Drive; on-platform /api/apply as alternate path

services.name: Vercel Blob
services.purpose: Photo and document uploads for apply and athlete profiles
recoverySteps: Regenerate token in Vercel Storage → Blob
services.backupStrategy: Blob objects not in Git; periodic export of critical documents

services.name: OpenAI
services.purpose: Reserved for future AI features — key present in Vercel, unused in codebase
recoverySteps: Remove OPENAI_API_KEY from Vercel if unused, or wire to Ask CPR module

services.name: EA Pulse
recoverySteps: Set EA_PULSE_INGEST_URL and EA_CAPTURE_API_KEY in Vercel
services.healthVerification: Pulse ingest endpoint 200 on test event
services.backupStrategy: Pulse event store on EA platform

services.name: Sentry
services.backupStrategy: Sentry retention policy; export critical issues

services.name: Vercel
services.purpose: Hosting, deployments, env vars, blob storage, domain aliases
services.backupStrategy: Git as code SSOT; release manifests in docs/releases/
